discoveries.title: Inference H/W ≠ dataset-native
discoveries.body: logs/exp1_4rc_dexycb .npz shows view_X_img is (1, 3, 378, 504). 4RC's load_images(size=512) preserves AR over DexYCB's 480×640 → 378×504 (27×36 patches × 14). Dataset returns 518×518 but that's never what 4RC inference actually feeds.

discoveries.title: Stage 2 default --num-epochs broke single-seq overfit
discoveries.body: Default 200 caps runs at 200 steps (1 clip × 1 batch per epoch with max-manifest-size=1). Stage 1 defaults 10000. Symptom was 2 jobs 'SUCCEEDED' in 17 min at step 180 instead of 3000.

discoveries.title: set -uo pipefail masks torchrun crash as ACP SUCCEEDED
discoveries.body: Without -e, a 429-free exit-1 from torchrun lets the trailing `echo 'training complete'` set bash's final exit to 0. ACP records SUCCEEDED for a job that never trained. Always use set -euo pipefail.

discoveries.title: sample_step_shape off-by-one on T range
discoveries.body: rng.randint(2, t_max + 1) with Python random.Random is inclusive on both ends → yields [2, t_max+1]. With t_max=16 we observed T=17 in history.json. Fixed to rng.randint(2, t_max).

discoveries.title: Motion-init loader assumes separate topology
discoveries.body: scripts/hoi3r_stage1_overfit.py:66 called model.hand_motion / model.obj_motion unconditionally. Under --motion-topology combined, those attributes don't exist — AttributeError crashed pt-vb73r5xg. Fixed to branch on args.motion_topology and load into combined_motion for the combined path.

discoveries.title: Two-forward scene-loss was wasteful
discoveries.body: The first scene-loss impl (09bb7a0) ran a second vanilla arc._forward() just for depth+camera heads. 2× ViT-G wall-time. Refactor f857235 captures intermediate feats at 4RC's hardcoded out_layers=[19,27,33,39] in a single forward; DualDPT consumes them directly. Bit-identity proven on fg path (max_abs_diff=0 on Z/C/T_tok/Q_hand/Q_obj). LoRA grad flows through shared feats.

discoveries.title: Workspace quota is shared across clusters
discoveries.body: workspace_aec2_total is summed across computing-cluster-01e + computing-cluster-01e-02 + a third cluster. Cluster selection targets a specific machine pool but can't bypass a 429. A tight poll-and-submit loop with <5s gap wins most races against other teams.

module_state.state: ArcEncoderWrapper supports encoder_mode={frozen,lora,unfreeze} and return_feats for scene-head access; 40 backbone qkv wraps under LoRA rank=16 alpha=32
Separate (HandMotionHead+ObjMotionHead) or shared-weight (CombinedMotionHead) via --motion-topology; cross-attn context switched to patches-only in a0783be
Stage 2 supports --scene-loss-weight with single-forward shared feats; DualDPT + CameraDec consume captured feats; frozen scene heads still paper-contract
Paper variable-T with --clip-len 0 --t-max 16 --fixed-h 378 --fixed-w 504 bs=4 matches inference input H/W; motion-init-from-4rc transfers 168/172 weights per head
4 jobs active on p1-video-world-model-for-robot-learning; pt-drxe2i2e template cloned for all submissions; set -euo pipefail in all new startup_scripts

caveats: 4 ACP jobs still RUNNING at conclude time; eval + publish pending on their completion (~2 hr each on 1-GPU).
hoi3r_eval.py currently feeds 518×518 (dataset-native) not 378×504 (train-matched); metrics comparison against pt-9fa652zu is on 518 too but a proper apples-to-apples review should align eval H/W.
Stage 2 num-epochs default of 200 remains unfixed in the script source; new submissions must pass --num-epochs explicitly. See feedback_stage2_num_epochs.md.
pt-vb73r5xg (E4 v1) was recorded as SUCCEEDED on ACP but actually crashed — the AttributeError was masked by missing `set -e`. Don't trust that job's state.

The motion-init loader reports `transferred=168/172` for both separate and combined paths; 4 weights are entity-specific (e.g., delta_proj + uncert) and don't transfer to the shared combined head. Known expected.
